name: legal-check
description: Reviews code, documents, and configurations for IT legal compliance. Triggers: legal, license, compliance, privacy, GDPR, copyright, terms, contract, OSS license, intellectual property, data protection. Source-code read-only — never modifies source code or test files. Outputs legal check report to output/reports/legal/ (requires Write permission to output/reports/legal/). Takes optional argument: /legal-check <target-scope or instruction>
